---
# Geofence-subscriber exhibit. Sensorvault Step 3 production: per-
# device subscriber/CSI return after law enforcement narrowed the
# device list. Each block is one de-anonymized account with name,
# account number, email(s), device, phone numbers.
#
# Render with:  quarto render exhibit-geofence-subscriber.qmd

format: warrant-vignette-typst
document-types:
  - attachment
  - exhibit

# ---- Header consistency ----
state: "Indiana"
county: "Pawnee County"
city: "Pawnee"
detective-name: "Detective B. Macklin"
case-number: "CR24-087"

# ---- Exhibit content ----
exhibit-description: |
  Attached is the Step 3 subscriber-information production from
  Google LLC, listing identifying account information for the
  devices law enforcement narrowed from the Step 1 anonymized
  list.

exhibit-type: geofence-subscriber
exhibit-title: "Google LLC -- Subscriber Information Production"

# Records live in a separate YAML data file because Pandoc's typst
# metadata writer drops the dict contents for this record schema.
exhibit-records-file: "data/exhibit-geofence-subscriber-records.yaml"
---
